offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/week, frequent mismatches cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of sales orders and shipping confirmations.
problem: Frequent mismatches between sales orders and shipping confirmations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly mismatch notification and Manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
